info.shortName: iPath Series B S&P 500 VIX Mid-
info.longName: iPath Series B S&P 500 VIX Mid-Term Futures ETN

funds_data.description: The ETN offers exposure to futures contracts of specified maturities on the VIX index and not direct exposure to the VIX index or its spot level. The index is designed to provide investors with exposure to one or more maturities of futures contracts on the CBOE Volatility Index®.
